properties.name: homenest.external.api.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable external listing import service.

properties.name: homenest.external.api.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the external hostel/accommodation API.

properties.name: homenest.external.api.key
properties.description: API key or token for the external provider (use environment variables in production).

properties.name: homenest.external.api.host-user
properties.description: Username of the host that will own imported listings.
